title: lomatium anomalum
intro: Lomatium anomalum, also known as Yellow Fescue Biscuitroot, is a perennial plant in the carrot family native to the northwestern United States and southwestern Canada. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Lomatium anomalum include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. Lomatium anomalum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and salves, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat colds, flu, and other infections.
